title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Taj Hotels

jsonLd.title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Taj Hotels
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Taj Hotels! We are hiring a Hotel Manager for our Ghaziabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Taj Hotels:
Taj Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
